title: QA Core Spec Kernel: canonical minimal pass — QA tuple system (b,e,d,a) with generators σ μ λ ν
_fixture_purpose: Canonical kernel witness for QA_CORE_SPEC.v1. Defines the minimal executable specification of the QA tuple system: 4-variable state space (b,e,d,a) under two structural constraints, four generators (sigma/mu/lambda/nu), two core invariants, bounded-BFS reachability, a four-type failure algebra, required logging fields, and gate sequence [0..5]. All five validator checks pass. This cert serves as the root ontology from which all downstream cert families inherit.

generators.name: sigma
generators.action: e → e + 1 (mod m); updates d and a to preserve constraints

generators.name: mu
generators.action: swap(b, e); recomputes d = b+e, a = b+2e

generators.name: lambda
generators.action: scale(b, e, d, a) by k; valid only when k divides no invariant

generators.name: nu
generators.action: divide tuple coordinates by 2 when all required coordinates are even

validation_checks.description: all preserves_invariants references resolve to declared invariants
validation_checks.details: invariant names={QA_relation_1,QA_relation_2}; all preserves_invariants entries resolve
